description: Project scaffolding: create folder structure, requirements.txt, .env.example, and .gitignore.
FastAPI server + dynamic Tripletex client: POST /solve + POST / endpoints, per-request credentials.
Gemini tool-calling agent: agentic loop with 4 tools (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE), model fallback chain.
Comprehensive system prompt: 18 task type templates with exact API paths, field names, and patterns.
File handling: PDF text extraction via pdfplumber, image pass-through, CSV/text decoding.
Error handling: tenacity retry (429/5xx only), RetryError unwrapping, empty response guard, async sleep.

API accuracy audit: Verified all endpoints against OpenAPI spec and sandbox. Fixed invoice payment (PUT /:payment), credit note (PUT /:createCreditNote), timesheet (/timesheet/entry), travel expense (travelDetails), VAT types (output=3, input=1), currency IDs (NOK=1).
Deployment via ngrok: persistent HTTPS URL, server on port 8000 with uvicorn --reload.
Sandbox testing: verify all task types work against sandbox API. Employee+employment, customer, product, project, department, travel expense confirmed working.
Competition submission: submit to platform, target all 30 task types passing, optimize for efficiency bonus.
